_meta: Golden set for the duplication-drift judge. Labelled by Claude 2026-06-24 from the 13 discovered candidate pairs + 5 anchors (in-sync / terser-OK / stale-contradiction / carry-forward-risk). Robert: audit/override humanScore as needed, then run npm run judge:dup-calibrate. Scores: 1.0=perfectly in sync, ~0.7=terser-OK, ~0.35=partial contradiction, <0.2=badly stale.

canonical: Status legend: active = failed within the last 90 days -> amplify one tier (LOW->MEDIUM, MEDIUM->HIGH, HIGH stays HIGH); cooling = failed 90-180 days ago -> amplify only if current risk is MEDIUM or higher; healed = no failure in 180+ days -> no amplification.
inline: Registry status effect on Step 1C.5 risk: active (failed <90 days) -> amplify one tier LOW->MEDIUM, MEDIUM->HIGH, HIGH stays HIGH; cooling (failed 90-180 days) -> amplify only if MEDIUM or higher; healed (180+ days) -> no amplification.

canonical: Phase 3 calls /confluence-ingest (and /context-load if a domain signal warrants). Skip on refresh if KB freshness < 14 days AND no new epic was added in Phase 1.5.
inline: Skip rule (refresh mode): if page-cache.md shows ingested PRDs are < 14 days old AND no new epic was added in Phase 1.5, skip this phase and reuse the prior run. Otherwise delegate to /confluence-ingest.

canonical: Priority: High | Normal | Low (regression tier - never author Critical; the component smoke is registry-allocated in smoke-suite.md and conferred at gate-time. No Medium). Category: Direct | Downstream | Negative | Data integrity.
inline: Priority: High | Normal | Low (regression tier; no Medium; never author Critical - registry-allocated). Category: Direct | Downstream | Negative | Data integrity.

canonical: Exclude IMA opportunity terminal states StatusId 7 (Lost) and 8 (Won) from mutation test data.
inline: IMA opportunity terminal state check: cs.ImaOpportunityStatusId NOT IN (7, 8)  -- 7=Won, 8=Dead (NOT Lost).

canonical: PTY-01 Random CI Party uses the CI filter - RelationshipManagerId = 1 = IGS-managed parties - with ORDER BY NEWID() sampling.
inline: Conventions: CI filter (always apply to party-scoped queries) p.RelationshipManagerId = 1 AND p.CreateDate BETWEEN DATEADD(YEAR,-1,GETDATE()) AND DATEADD(WEEK,-2,GETDATE()); Sampling (never hardcode IDs) ORDER BY NEWID().

canonical: Every /sync run writes .claude/sync-runs/{YYYY-MM-DD}.md containing the dashboard, per-sub-skill detail reports, and (for --apply runs) the per-area decision log. git log .claude/sync-runs/ shows the drift trajectory over time.
inline: Every /sync run writes .claude/sync-runs/<YYYY-MM-DD>.md containing the DRIFT AUDIT dashboard, each sub-skill detail report, (if --apply) the per-area decision log, and the SYNC SUMMARY. This artifact is the trend record - git log shows the drift trajectory.

canonical: Resolve the contributor: git config user.name (first word -> Robert/Jess); lowercase -> <name>. Append ONE single-line JSON object to .claude/skills/<this-skill>/runs.<name>.jsonl matching the schema {date, by, ticket, quality, well, poorly, improve, model, duration?, run?}. Append only - never edit prior lines.
inline: Resolve the contributor: git config user.name (first word -> Robert/Jess; fallback: branch name segment); lowercase -> <name>. Append ONE single-line JSON object to runs.<name>.jsonl (create if absent). Append only - never edit prior lines.

canonical: ticket.md header + lifecycle: Three-amigos writes Sections 1-4 and Section 8 stub rows; ready-for-testing enriches 3-4 and adds 5-7; ready-for-playwright fills Section 8; ready-for-qa finalizes Section 9.
inline: three-amigos skill frontmatter: pre-sprint TC design; stops at TC planning - no test implementation, Zephyr recording, or Jira reporting; implementation handled by /ready-for-testing post-merge.

canonical: Section 4 - SQL Data Setup: Three-amigos writes precondition descriptions + suggested SQL Library IDs (e.g. OPP-01) only - no SQL execution, no Sampled ID. Columns: Precondition | Entity | SQL Library ID | Sampled ID | Used by TC#.
inline: Three-amigos does NOT run SQL. For each precondition write a Section 4 row with Precondition, Entity, and Finder - the loosest sqlDB.* finder from sql-finder-manifest.md whose shape satisfies the precondition; if none, write compose.

canonical: Steps: terse, one action per step, each with an explicit expected result; lead with the user action in plain English. Identifiers/SQL/input values go in the testData field, not the description. DB-verification step goes last. No Given/When/Then. Carve-out: preserve genuinely-rich manual procedures.
inline: Follow the step format: terse, one action per step, each with an explicit expected result; lead with plain English; keep technical detail (OAIds, API endpoints, SQL) in the testData field; DB-verification step last; do NOT use Given/When/Then. Carve-out: preserve genuinely-rich manual procedures.

canonical: Default environment: int. Use qa only when explicitly requested.
inline: Runs against int by default; pass qa only when the user asks for it.

canonical: The schema catalog lives at _shared/knowledge/reference/schema-reference.md (moved here in the KT-migration; the old _shared/schema-reference.md no longer exists).
inline: Read _shared/schema-reference.md for confirmed column names before composing SQL.

canonical: Data Sampling: sample test entities via dataFactory (NEWID-based) - never hardcode IDs; apply the CI filter for party-scoped queries; exclude IMA opportunity terminal states from mutation data; known-good entities live in the domain knowledge faces.
inline: Conventions: CI filter, NEWID sampling, never hardcode IDs, terminal-state exclusion, AccountReferenceTypeId=1 for party reference.

canonical: Zephyr TC titles all start with Verify - the one exception is data-setup TCs, which use the Data - <Helper> prefix (e.g. Data - GetCiParties).
inline: All Zephyr TC titles start with Verify.
NOT IN (7,8) -- 7=Won, 8=Dead. The operative exclusion set (7,8) is identical; only the parenthetical labels differ, so acting on it excludes the right rows.

canonical: schema-reference.md moved to _shared/knowledge/reference/; the old _shared/schema-reference.md no longer exists.
inline: Read _shared/schema-reference.md - acting on this reads a path that no longer exists (silent miss).
